---
title: The Semester in 5 Minutes
author: "CDS DS-122<br>Boston University"
format: 
    revealjs:
        math: true
        css: 
        - styles.css
        html-math-method: mathjax
        highlight-style: github
        slide-number: true
        show-slide-number: all
        chalkboard: true 
---

## What Have We Talked About?
:::{style="font-size: .75em"}

 - The fundamentals of probability
 - The difference between frequentist and Bayesian points of view on probability and statistics
 - Markov chains and hidden Markov models
 - The use of statistics in the real world

:::{.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

:::{.center-text}
<img src="images/intro/Coin_toss.jpg" width=300/>
:::

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

:::{.center-text}
<img src="images/intro/NBA_Finals_2025.png" width=300/>
:::

:::
:::

:::

## Real-Life Applications
:::{style="font-size: .8em"}
:::{.center-text}
<img src="images/closing/teaser_problems.png" width=900/>
:::

:::

## Practice Makes It Click
:::{style="font-size: .8em"}


:::{.columns}
::: {.column width="40%"}

We strengthened our understanding by solving problems 

- throughout the lecture 
- as group questions
- in homework assignments
- during discussions

:::
::: {.column width="60%"}

:::{.center-text}
<img src="images/axioms of probability/Holly_Leaves.png" width=600/>
:::

:::
:::

:::


## Considered Problems
:::{style="font-size: .8em"}


:::{.columns}
::: {.column width="30%"}

:::{.center-text}
<img src="images/intro/World_cup_thropy.png" width=180/>
:::

:::
::: {.column width="70%"}

1. How can we determine whether one soccer team is significantly better than another?

:::
:::

:::{.columns}

:::
::: {.column width="70%"}

2. How did a group of MIT students crack the Massachusetts State Lottery?
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

:::{.center-text}
<img src="images/intro/MA_lottery_logo.png" width=300/>
:::

:::

:::

## Considered Problems
:::{style="font-size: .8em"}

3. How can we accurately assign word classes to a body of text?

:::{.center-text}
<img src="images/intro/POS_example.png" width=600/>
::: 

4. How can we estimate the total number of episodes in a show after watching just one?

:::{.center-text}
<img src="images/intro/Netflix.png" width=400/>
::: 

:::

## Course Evaluations
:::{style="font-size: .8em"}

Please submit your course evaluations:

- For Prof. Wobbes, CDS DS 122 A1 - Foundations of Data Science 3

- For Yuke Zhang, CDS DS 122 A3/A4/A5 - Foundations of Data Science 3

<br>
Your feedback is valuable to us!
:::
